{{Infobox technique
| name = Elysian Gate
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|An [[Elysian Gate]] can be opened by [[Alin]]'s will.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A red Gate could potentially be an [[Elysian Gate]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Elysian Gate]] is filled with thousands of waving, flailing branches.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
